title: 360-Degree Feedback Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the 360-Degree Feedback skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

defined_competency_model.description: Defined competency model with behavioral indicators for the role or level being assessed

list_ratees.description: List of ratees (individuals being assessed) with confirmed rater group assignments

survey_instrument_aligned.description: Survey instrument aligned to the competency model with a validated rating scale and open-text questions

prior_year_360.description: Prior year 360 results for longitudinal trend comparison

role.description: Role-specific performance data to contextualize behavioral ratings
